commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Who disturb the city, put it in an uproar. In the ordinary Greek copies, for the city, we read the whole world. (Witham)

commentaries.author: John Chrysostom
commentaries.content: O the tyranny! Dragged them without any cause out of their houses. These all, say they, do contrary to the decrees of Cæsar

commentaries.author: Richard Challoner
commentaries.content: City: Urbem. In the Greek, the world.
